changelog: Sports: CBC channels are no longer shown in per-game channel results. Filter lives in data/sports/SportsChannelBlacklist.kt — add more patterns there to block additional feeds.

Sports back nav: pressing BACK from a sports player now returns directly to the main Sports page instead of re-opening the channel picker. The 'search results' style sheet stays dismissed once a channel is selected.
All v1.44.55 features (76 Moods & Themes rows, scroll preservation, hot-patchable theme pack) still in place.
